--- title: "ASE Data Pipeline Overview" format: html execute: echo: true # show code message: true # show stdout/print output --- --- # Datsase Download Since the option `prefer_scenes_with_max_snippets` is true per default, this will list all scenes sorted by the number of snippets they contain (descending). The `-n 5` flag limits the output to the top 5 scenes. ::: {#c272c8e0 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} !python -m aria_nbv.data.downloader -m list -c efm -n 5 ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ::: {.ansi-escaped-output} ```{=html} 
<frozen runpy>:128: RuntimeWarning: 'aria_nbv.data.downloader' found in sys.modules after import of package 'aria_nbv.data', but prior to execution of 'aria_nbv.data.downloader'; this may result in unpredictable behaviour

[ASEDownloader]: Configured paths: mesh_json=/home/jandu/repos/NBV/.data/aria_download_urls/ase_mesh_download_urls.json,

atek_json=/home/jandu/repos/NBV/.data/aria_download_urls/AriaSyntheticEnvironment_ATEK_download_urls.json, 

mesh_dir=/home/jandu/repos/NBV/.data/ase_meshes

[DownloaderCLI]: ============================================================

[DownloaderCLI]: ASE Dataset - Available Scenes

[DownloaderCLI]: ============================================================

[DownloaderCLI]: Total scenes with GT meshes: 100

[DownloaderCLI]: 

Showing 5 scenes:

[DownloaderCLI]:   Scene 83550: 49 snippets

[DownloaderCLI]:   Scene 81283: 45 snippets

[DownloaderCLI]:   Scene 81286: 43 snippets

[DownloaderCLI]:   Scene 83515: 42 snippets

[DownloaderCLI]:   Scene 82647: 40 snippets

[DownloaderCLI]: ============================================================
``` ::: ::: ::: This will download the top 5 scenes with the most snippets, but limit each scene to a maximum of 10 snippets. `-c {efm_eval|efm|cubercnn|cubercnn_eval}` specifies the configuration to use (here: EFM evaluation set). ```sh python -m aria_nbv.data.downloader -m download -c efm -n 5 --ms 10 ``` **Note**: While ATEK defines different options for both variants (EFM training and evaluation), the downloader will always download the full scenes. The splitting into training and evaluation sets is handeled based on The ASE download cli supports the following options: # Dataset config & auto-discovery The `ASEDatasetConfig` provides several options for configuring the dataset loading process. See the docstring for details. - **Auto tar resolution**: if `tar_urls` is empty, shards are globbed under resolved ATEK root; if `scene_ids` are provided, only those subdirs are used. - **Mesh resolution**: when `load_meshes=True`, meshes are loaded from `.data/ase_meshes/scene_ply_{scene}.ply` (or inferred from `scene_ids`). - `atek_variant`: selects which version of the ATEK datset to use ("efm" or "efm_eval"). There don't seem to be any differences in the resulting ATEK dataset. ::: {#54c18c78 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from aria_nbv.data.dataset import ASEDatasetConfig cfg = ASEDatasetConfig(verbose=True, atek_variant="efm_eval") cfg.inspect() ds = cfg.setup_target() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html} 
[ASEDatasetConfig::config]: Resolved 84 tar shards for scenes ['81283', '81286', '82004', '83515', '83550']
``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html} 
[ASEDatasetConfig::config]: Resolved 84 tar shards for scenes ['81283', '81286', '82004', '83515', '83550']
``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html}

[ASEDataset]: ATEK loader ready
``` ::: ::: The dataset object `ds` yields samples of type "TyppedASESample", this dataclass stores the complex flat-dict from the `AtekWDSDataset` in `ds.flat` and provides typed views via properties. The follow ::: {#d6963d38 .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} sample = next(iter(ds)) sample.rich_summary(show_only_sample=["efm_gt"]) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html}

`ts_world_device` `(F,3,4)`, timestamps, gravity. - **SemiDenseView**: per-frame SLAM points + stds + volume bounds. - **GTView**: parses `obb3_gt`, `obb2_gt`, `scores`, `efm_gt`, `rri_targets`; preserves raw. --- # Mesh handling - Mesh loaded once per scene (cached if `cache_meshes=True`). - Mesh shape hints in repr: `{'verts': N, 'faces': M}`. ---
